name: The vigilant
description:
Regina Dorn, known as The Vigilant, the Praetorian of Terra, the Unyielding One, and to her gene-daughters by the wall-name of Defiance, was the Primarch of the Imperial Fists Space Marine Legion and one of the greatest heroes in the history of the Imperium of Man.

Born from the Emperor's gene-labs on ancient Terra, Regina Dorn was scattered by the machinations of the Chaos Gods to the frozen ice-world of Inwit, where she was found and raised by the harsh clans of the House of Dorn. Growing amid blizzards and endless night, she mastered survival, leadership, and the art of unbreachable fortification, eventually reactivating the colossal battle-barge *Phalanx* and uniting the Inwit Cluster under her iron rule as its empress. When the Emperor reunited with her during the Great Crusade, she pledged absolute, unwavering loyalty, her stoic heart burning with unshakeable faith in His vision for humanity.

As Primarch of the VII Legion, Regina Dorn transformed the Imperial Fists into peerless masters of siegecraft, defense, and disciplined warfare. She oversaw the monumental fortification of the Imperial Palace on Terra, turning the Throneworld into an impregnable bastion that withstood the fury of the Horus Heresy. During the cataclysmic Siege of Terra, she directed the defense for fifty-five grueling days, personally leading counter-assaults and standing resolute even as brothers fell and the galaxy burned. It was Regina who carried the mortally wounded Emperor to the Golden Throne, her hands stained with His blood, vowing eternal vigilance.

Post-Heresy, she reluctantly accepted the division of her Legion under the Codex Astartes, founding successor Chapters such as the Black Templars and Crimson Fists while enduring the bitter Iron Cage campaign against Perturabo's Iron Warriors—a trial of fire that tested her resolve to its limits. Regina Dorn embodied unbreakable duty: blunt, honest to a fault, incapable of deceit, and driven by an austere sense of responsibility. She wielded Storm's Teeth, a massive chainblade forged on Inwit, clad in ornate auramite armor etched with Imperial iconography, her white hair and stern golden gaze inspiring awe and fear in equal measure.

Her fate remains shrouded in mystery. During a desperate boarding action against a Chaos vessel in the waning years of the 31st Millennium, she vanished amid the void, leaving only her skeletal left hand recovered as a sacred relic aboard the Phalanx. To this day, the Imperial Fists and their successors believe the Praetorian of Terra endures somewhere in the darkness, ready to return when the Imperium's walls face their greatest trial.
creator: Abyazha
